uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14805 hand-flips node_runtime_source_attestor_effect to canonical def-B via a PURE RENAME attest->handle (OMN-14781 path): the attestation body is preserved byte-identically and the business-logic helpers (_resolve_main_head/_compute_distance/_emit_friction) are re-derived byte-identical base_ref<->HEAD by the ratchet from git. Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation plus the green runtime-dispatch parity tests over the selected input corpus, not by a broad branch-coverage claim over the legacy handler body; the git-subprocess branches inside the preserved helpers are network-dependent and covered by the existing patched unit suite, so they are stubbed in the deterministic dispatch corpus.
